title: Leptorumohra sinomiqueliana
constituents: Leptorumohra sinomiqueliana contains various active constituents, including sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. These sesquiterpene lactones have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Additionally, the plant also contains other compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its overall bioactivity. The combination of these active constituents in Leptorumohra sinomiqueliana makes it a valuable source of potential therapeutic agents. Further research is needed to fully understand the medicinal potential of this plant.
